title: Identity+
description: Adds unique health and speed values to every mob when using Identity, making transformations feel more immersive, balanced, and true to each creature.
body:
# **Identity+**

Ever felt like shapeshifting with Identity was missing a bit of realism?
With Identity+, every mob comes with its own health and speed values, so turning into a rabbit really feels like being a rabbit, and becoming a warden makes you a true tank.

**✨ What it does:**

- Adjusts your HP and movement speed depending on the mob you transform into.
- Keeps your current health when switching, so no awkward full-heal exploits.
- Makes transformations more immersive, balanced, and fun.
